name: Sicilian Defense Grand Prix Attack
description: An attacking anti-Sicilian setup where White aims for quick kingside pressure.

name: Sicilian Defense Alapin Variation
description: A practical anti-Sicilian where White builds a broad center with c3 and d4.

name: Smith-Morra Gambit
description: A gambit against the Sicilian where White sacrifices a pawn for rapid development and initiative.

name: Sicilian Defense Sveshnikov Variation
description: A sharp Sicilian where Black accepts structural weaknesses for active piece play.

name: Sicilian Defense Paulsen Variation
description: A flexible Sicilian system where Black chooses a setup after ...e6 ideas.

description: A strategic QGD line where White exchanges on d5 and often plays for minority attack plans.

name: Queen's Gambit Declined Orthodox Defense
description: A classical QGD structure with strong central control and traditional development.

description: A classical QGA line where Black gives back the pawn at the right moment and activates pieces.

name: Semi-Slav Defense Main Line
description: A rich and highly theoretical opening blending Slav and Queen's Gambit structures.

description: A main Nimzo-Indian line with deep strategic play and long-term structural ideas.

description: A flexible Nimzo-Indian where White develops solidly and Black plays against structure and dark squares.

description: An ambitious King's Indian system where White builds a large center with f3 and prepares e4.

description: A restrained anti-King's Indian setup where White uses kingside fianchetto for stability.

description: The central main line against the Grunfeld where White builds a strong center and Black attacks it.

description: A flexible response to the English where Black can aim for reversed Queen's Indian or Slav-like setups.

description: A kingside-fianchetto approach in the English Opening with many transpositional possibilities.

name: King's Indian Attack
description: A setup-based opening where White uses Nf3, g3, Bg2 and d3 against many different defenses.

name: Bird Opening
description: An offbeat flank opening based on 1.f4 with attacking chances and reversed Dutch structures.
